abilities.description: When you next cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn, copy it and you may choose new targets for the copy.

effect.description: When you next cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn, copy it and you may choose new targets for the copy.
effect.name: DelayedTrigger

triggers.description: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, if this artifact has fewer than three charge counters on it, put a charge counter on it.
